3:
According to Raya–O–Senna, the unrest that has come to the Twelveswood is a manifestation of the elementals' fury. Soothing their anger and restoring harmony to the forest is the duty of the white mage─a duty she feels transcends race or nation. She would ask that you continue to hone your skills while she thinks of a way to persuade her brother, A–Ruhn–Senna, that you are the right <If(PlayerParameter(4))>woman<Else/>man</If> for the job.

※The next white mage quest will be available from Raya–O–Senna upon reaching level 40.
